description_long: This is a rectangular sink with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a wide, shallow white basin set into a light wood-textured countertop. The basin has straight, clean edges and a central drain, with a matte black faucet mounted on the right side of the countertop. The wood-textured base appears solid and blocky, providing a sturdy support for the basin. The faucet is a single-lever mixer, likely made of metal with a matte finish, and is positioned for easy access. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban public restrooms, commercial spaces, or upscale outdoor installations. The sink's design emphasizes both functionality and aesthetic appeal, with a focus on clean lines and contrasting materials.
description: A modern rectangular sink with a white basin set in a light wood-textured countertop and a matte black faucet on the right. The design is sleek, minimalist, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide white basin, central drain, and the black faucet on the right side of the wood-textured countertop.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the basin and the central alignment of the drain and faucet.
description_view_2: Rear view with the faucet more prominently visible on the left, showing the full width of the countertop and basin.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the faucet's placement and the rectangular shape of the sink and countertop.
